#  Add a Change Order in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The Contract Room is a shared portal where vendors can submit change orders and invoices directly to the project team for approval throughout the duration of the project. The Change Orders tab of the Contract Room is where change orders can be added and reviewed.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Vendor' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Vendor' or 'Limited' permissions can only add change orders to a contract they have access to. If you are a vendor submitting a change order, see [Submit a Change Order for a Portfolio Financials Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/submit-a-change-order-for-a-portfolio-financials-project).
  * **Additional Information** :
    * Invoices and change orders are typically added by a contact on the vendor team, but can also be added by a member of your project team. The interface for vendors is nearly identical, except vendors cannot see your budget.
    * If your organization has the 'Change Order Breakdowns' feature enabled for your account, you can choose to break down costs for a change order. See Add a Broken Down Change Order in the Steps section below.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the relevant **Contract** **Room** by clicking the name of the cost item in the project's **Cost Tracker**.   
_Note:_ Cost items with a Contract Room are marked with a **ribbon** ![Icon Ribbon Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e12d2de58e5c5ac13827dbf1f96f2148/0687361a917c45c1d15c3b11b0b16fac/icon-ribbon-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  2. Click the **Change Orders** tab.
  3. Click **Add Change Order**.  
  
![Add Change Order](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3d76122a4cac60e4f7ba5aa5a6492d8d/b409fa90122f04b9f8b1498644980278/add-change-order.png?fm=webp)  

  4. Fill out the following fields:  
_Note_ : Fields with an asterisk (*) are required.
     * **Number** *
     * **Title**
     * **Amount** *
     * **Date***
     * **Description**
  5. _Optional:_ Click **Add Document** to upload any necessary documentation to the Documents section.
  6. Choose whether you want to notify the vendor of the change order you are adding:
     * Mark the checkbox next to 'Notify [Vendor Name] upon submission' to notify the vendor of the change order.
     * Clear the checkbox next to 'Notify [Vendor Name] upon submission' to add the change order without notifying the vendor.
  7. Click **Submit**.


#### Optional: Add a Broken Down Change Order
#####  Important
The 'Cost Breakdown' setting is only available if the 'Change Order Breakdowns' feature is enabled for your organization's account. Reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
  1. Fill out the following fields:   
_Note:_ Fields with an asterisk (*) are required.
     * **Number** *
     * **Title**
     * **Date***
     * **Description**
  2. Click the **Cost Breakdown** toggle to the ON ![Icon Toggle On Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/6e94c0cbe83d69e90aff8578cce4162b/50f3875bdca0dee73c9887099e1e4fef/icon-toggle-on-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=17) position.  
_Note:_ After this setting is enabled, you will no longer be able to enter a lump sum amount for the change order.
  3. In the 'CO Details' section, enter dollar amounts against each of the contract's schedule items.
  4. _Optional:_ Click **Add Document** to upload any necessary documentation to the Documents section.
  5. Click **Submit**.  
_Note:_ To review the broken down costs of a submitted change order, scroll to the Cost Details section.


## See Also
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Associate an Allocation Rule with an Item in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/associate-an-allocation-rule-with-an-item-in-portfolio-financials)
  * [Complete a Contract or Change Order in Portfolio Financials with DocuSign®](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/complete-a-contract-or-change-order-in-portfolio-financials-with-docusign)
title: Add a Change Order in Portfolio Financials
description: How to add a change order to the Contract Room in Portfolio Financials.
